title: Japanese Altar
description: Adds a Japanese-styled altar that grants various effects when given an offering.
body:
## About
Japanese Altar adds a new block, the altar, to the game. The altar can be crafted and when used will grant the player a blessing. It can also be placed for decoration.

![The altar block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0155d10a34f5aebe74359c64b7aa3bec5d229ae5.png)
#### Mod Loader
Fabric Loader

## How to Craft an Altar
An altar requires polished andesite, wooden fences, and wooden slabs.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed1f264742b0bddadc8a1bce3ff39b38cd8bfdac.png)

## How to Use an Altar
The altar will bestow a status effect when the player gives an offering at the altar.

To make an offering: 
1. Have at least 5 XP levels
2. Have a valid offering in your main hand
3. Right-click the altar with the offering
### Blessings
When a player is blessed with a status effect, it will last for half of a Minecraft day (10 minutes). You can only have one blessing at a time. To get another blessing, you must wait out the effect or drink milk to clear the effects.
### Basic Offering VS Special Offering
- A basic offering is made when you offer bread. This will give you a random effect.
- A special offering is made when you offer a specific item. This will give you a more specific effect.
### Effects List & Offerings
An offering of bread will give a random effect.
#### Specific Offerings & Effects
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Glistering Melon
> - Regeneration
- Golden Carrot
> - Saturation
- Blaze Powder
> - Strength
- Golden Apple
> - Resistance
> - Absorption V
- Sugar
> - Speed
> - Haste

</details>
